title: “CHILDREN”: The Attack on the Donetsk Regional Academic Drama Theatre in Mariupol, Ukraine
strengths: Most detailed open reconstruction of the theatre strike; combines survivor interviews, imagery, damage analysis, and explicit discussion of uncertainty.
limitations: Does not produce a final audited fatality count; some occupancy and casualty estimates remain ranges reconstructed from witnesses.
notes: Used as the primary anchor. AP and city-council figures are carried only because Amnesty summarizes them and explicitly compares them.
